overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair walking through Night City at dusk. The character navigates busy sidewalks, crosses streets, and passes by neon-lit storefronts and futuristic skyscrapers with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk approaching major intersection with elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: character walks underneath the yellow pedestrian overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward a busy intersection with a large circular billboard structure visible ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car driving along the street with neon underglow

entered.detail: large cylindrical building with rotating digital advertisements on multiple levels
elevated walkway with distinctive yellow structural beams crossing over the street
tall glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
rain-slicked street surface reflecting the neon lights of the city

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet downtown sidewalk at dusk, approaching a major intersection dominated by a large circular billboard structure. The yellow pedestrian overpass looms ahead as futuristic vehicles pass by on the left, their lights reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and towering digital billboards

events.description: character steps onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
camera pans upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and giant digital billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the zebra crossing then turning to admire the towering architecture and neon signage above

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving through the intersection with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes on the dark wet asphalt
massive curved screen displaying advertisements on the side of a building

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection at the zebra crossing, navigating between futuristic vehicles. After crossing, the camera pans upward to reveal the immense scale of the surrounding skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards that dominate the Night City skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated pedestrian walkway with police presence

events.description: enters the sheltered area walking underneath the yellow overpass structure
passes by an NCPD police car parked on the side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing various pedestrians and the parked police vehicle

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright orange pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: futuristic police cruiser with glowing blue NCPD markings and emergency lights
brightly lit vending machine with advertisements glowing on the sidewalk
gray concrete pedestrian walkway under the shadow of the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the shelter of the yellow pedestrian overpass, the character moves along the concrete sidewalk. An NCPD police car is parked on the right with its blue lights glowing, while various pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The environment is darker here, with mixed lighting from neon signs and shadows from the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with vibrant neon storefronts and heavy pedestrian traffic

events.description: passing by storefronts with brightly colored neon panels in green, orange, and purple

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing various pedestrians and colorful neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and blue outfit walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: commercial storefronts with vibrant neon lighting and large glass windows
vertical light panels displaying shifting colors of green, orange, and purple

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the enclosed commercial sidewalk, passing by vibrant neon storefronts with colorful illuminated panels. The crowd density increases with various pedestrians walking in opposing directions, and the atmosphere is dominated by the glow of green, orange, and purple neon lights reflecting off the wet concrete.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked downtown district that shifts from a street-level perspective to a sweeping view of the urban skyline. It begins with the character walking along a wet sidewalk at dusk, approaching a major intersection marked by a large circular billboard and a looming yellow pedestrian overpass. As the character steps onto the zebra crossing, the camera navigates through the flow of futuristic vehicles and their reflections on the pavement. The scene then expands as the camera pans upward upon reaching the other side, transitioning from the immediate bustle of the street to the immense scale of glowing digital billboards and towering skyscrapers.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowed urban corridor that gradually opens into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath the shelter of a yellow pedestrian overpass, moving along a concrete sidewalk past a parked NCPD police car with glowing blue lights. As the character advances, the oppressive shadows of the overhead structure give way to an enclosed commercial walkway. The scene then expands into a denser crowd of pedestrians, where the lighting shifts from dim urban tones to a vivid glow of green, orange, and purple neon. Finally, the environment becomes fully saturated with colorful illuminated panels reflecting off the wet concrete pavement.
